zh.lifeSummary: 當Alexander Radcliffe於1401年出生在英國藍卡爾薩爾福德時，他的父親Sir John Radcliffe II23歲，母親Clementina Standish25歲。他於1438年與Agnes Harington在英國藍卡爾薩爾福德結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1475年7月20日在英國藍卡爾奧爾德薩爾享年74歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭格亞特 曼徹斯特曼徹斯特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alexander Radcliffe于1401年出生在英国藍卡爾薩爾福德时，他的父亲Sir John Radcliffe II23岁，母亲Clementina Standish25岁。他于1438年与Agnes Harington在英国藍卡爾薩爾福德结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1475年7月20日在英国藍卡爾奧爾德薩爾享年74岁，埋葬在英国英格兰格亞特 曼徹斯特曼徹斯特。

nameMeanings.name: Radcliffe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Ratliff
meanings: English (Suffolk): habitational name from one or more of the places so named, such as Radcliffe (Lancashire), Radcliffe on Trent and Ratcliffe on Soar (both Nottinghamshire), Radclive (Buckinghamshire), Ratcliffe Culey and Ratcliffe on the Wreake (both Leicestershire), Ratclyffe in Clyst Hydon, Ratcliffes in Thorverton, and Ratcliffes in Broad Clyst (all Devon), Ratcliff in Stepney (Middlesex), and Rackley in Compton Bishop (Somerset). The placenames derive from Old English rēad ‘red’ + clif ‘cliff, bank, steep slope’ (see also Rutley ). A family of the name Radcliffe trace their descent from Sir Nicholas de Radclyffe. He is said to have been a knight who held the major of Radcliffe in Lancashire and served Roger de Poitou, Baron de Marsey in the 11th century.

nameMeanings.name: Alexander
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Alexander Radcliffe was born in 1401, in Salford, Lancashire, England, his father, Sir John Radcliffe II, was 23 and his mother, Clementina Standish, was 25. He married Agnes Harington in 1438, in Salford, Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 5 daughters. He died on 20 July 1475, in Ordsall, Lancashire, England, at the age of 74, and was buried in Manchester, Greater Manchester, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alexander Radcliffe est né en 1401, à Salford, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Radcliffe II, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Clementina Standish, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Agnes Harington en 1438, à Salford, Lancashire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé le 20 juillet 1475, à Ordsall, Lancashire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 74 ans, et a été enterré à Manchester, Greater Manchester, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: Alexander Radcliffeが1401年にイギリスランカシュアイアサルフォードで生まれた時，父Sir John Radcliffe IIは23歳，母Clementina Standishは25歳であった。1438年にイギリスランカシュアイアサルフォードでAgnes Haringtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1475年7月20日にイギリスランカシュアイアオルドサルで74歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスグレアター マンチェスターマンチェスターにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alexander Radcliffe(이)가 1401년 영국 랭카실르 살퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Radcliffe II(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Clementina Standish(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1438년 영국 랭카실르 살퍼드에서 Agnes Harington(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1475년 7월 20일 영국 랭카실르 르드사에서 74세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 그리터 먼체스터 먼체스터에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alexander Radcliffe nasceu em 1401, em Salford, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Radcliffe II, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Clementina Standish, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes Harington em 1438, em Salford, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 20 de julho de 1475, em Ordsall, Lancashire, Inglaterra, com 74 anos, e foi sepultado em Manchester, Greater Manchester, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alexander Radcliffe родился в 1401 г. в местности салфорд, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John Radcliffe II было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Clementina Standish, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes Harington в 1438 г. в местности салфорд, ланкашир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Он умер 20 июля 1475 г. в местности ордсалл, ланкашир, Англия в возрасте 74 лет и был похоронен в местности манчестир, гритир манчестир, Англия, Великобритания.
